mapper.select: SELECT c.CLAIM_NO as claimNo, c.MEMBER_ID as memberId, c.POLICY_NO as policyNo, c.CLAIM_AMOUNT as claimAmount, c.APPROVE_AMOUNT as approveAmount, c.CLAIM_STATUS as claimStatus, c.AGENT_ID as agentId, c.APPLY_TIME as applyTime, c.EXPIRY_TIME as expiryTime, c.SETTLE_TIME as settleTime, c.REMARK as remark, c.UPDATE_USER as updateUser, m.NAME as memberName, m.BIRTHDAY as birthday, m.GENDER as gender, p.RISK_LEVEL as riskLevel, c.FILE_01_NAME as file01Name, c.FILE_01_PATH as file01Path, c.FILE_02_NAME as file02Name, c.FILE_02_PATH as file02Path, u.DISPLAY_NAME as agentName, p.PRODUCT_CODE as productCode, prod.PRODUCT_NAME as productName, prod.PRODUCT_TYPE as productType, p.EFFECT_DATE as effectDate, p.EXPIRE_DATE as expireDate, prod.MIN_AMOUNT as minAmount, prod.MAX_AMOUNT as maxAmount FROM tb_claim c LEFT JOIN tb_user u ON c.AGENT_ID = u.USER_ID LEFT JOIN tb_cust_user m ON c.MEMBER_ID = m.MEMBER_ID LEFT JOIN tb_policy p ON c.POLICY_NO = p.POLICY_NO LEFT JOIN tb_product prod ON p.PRODUCT_CODE = prod.PRODUCT_CODE WHERE c.CLAIM_NO = #{claimNo}
SELECT MEMBER_ID as memberId, NAME as name FROM tb_cust_user ORDER BY MEMBER_ID ASC
SELECT p.POLICY_NO as policyNo, prod.PRODUCT_NAME as productName, p.MEMBER_ID as memberId FROM tb_policy p LEFT JOIN tb_product prod ON p.PRODUCT_CODE = prod.PRODUCT_CODE ORDER BY p.POLICY_NO ASC
SELECT USER_ID as agentId, DISPLAY_NAME as agentName FROM tb_user ORDER BY USER_ID ASC
mapper.update: DELETE FROM tb_claim WHERE CLAIM_NO = #{claimNo} AND CLAIM_STATUS = 'PENDING'

UPDATE tb_claim SET CLAIM_STATUS = #{claimStatus}, UPDATE_USER = #{aprvUser}, APPROVE_AMOUNT = #{approveAmount}, SETTLE_TIME = CASE WHEN #{claimStatus} IN ('APPROVED', 'REJECTED') THEN NOW() ELSE NULL END WHERE CLAIM_NO = #{claimNo}
mapper.select:
SELECT c.CLAIM_NO as claimNo, c.POLICY_NO as policyNo, c.CLAIM_AMOUNT as claimAmount, c.APPROVE_AMOUNT as approveAmount, c.CLAIM_STATUS as claimStatus, c.MEMBER_ID as memberId, c.REMARK as remark, c.FILE_01_NAME as file01Name, c.FILE_01_PATH as file01Path, c.FILE_02_NAME as file02Name, c.FILE_02_PATH as file02Path, m.NAME as memberName, m.BIRTHDAY as birthday, m.GENDER as gender, p.RISK_LEVEL as riskLevel, prod.PRODUCT_NAME as productName, prod.MIN_AMOUNT as minAmount, prod.MAX_AMOUNT as maxAmount FROM tb_claim c LEFT JOIN tb_cust_user m ON c.MEMBER_ID = m.MEMBER_ID LEFT JOIN tb_policy p ON c.POLICY_NO = p.POLICY_NO LEFT JOIN tb_product prod ON p.PRODUCT_CODE = prod.PRODUCT_CODE
AND c.CLAIM_STATUS = #{status}
AND c.CLAIM_STATUS IN ('SUBMIT', 'PENDING', 'RETURN')
AND c.POLICY_NO LIKE CONCAT('%', #{policyNo}, '%')
ORDER BY c.UPDATE_TIME DESC

SELECT l.CLAIM_LOG_NO as claimLogNo, l.CLAIM_NO as claimNo, l.POLICY_NO as policyNo, l.CLAIM_STATUS as claimStatus, l.APPROVE_AMOUNT as approveAmount, l.APRV_REMARK as aprvRemark, l.CREATE_TIME as createTime, l.APRV_TIME as aprvTime, COALESCE(u.DISPLAY_NAME, l.APRV_USER) as aprvUser FROM tb_claim_aprv_log l LEFT JOIN tb_user u ON l.APRV_USER = u.USERNAME WHERE l.CLAIM_NO = #{claimNo} ORDER BY l.CLAIM_LOG_NO DESC
